title: UpdateCallRequest
description: UpdateCallRequest schema from Bandwidth voice API

state.description: Set to completed to hang up the call

redirectUrl.description: The URL to redirect the call to for new BXML instructions

redirectMethod.description: The HTTP method for the redirect webhook

redirectFallbackUrl.description: Fallback URL if the primary redirect URL fails

redirectFallbackMethod.description: The HTTP method for the fallback redirect webhook

tag.description: A custom string to attach to the call for tracking purposes
